name: Whole Wheat Blueberry Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients in a medium bowl.
2. Beat the milk, eggs, and oil together in another medium bowl.
3. Stir in the blueberries.
4. Combine the wet and dry mixtures until just blended.
5. Heat a frying pan with a little oil.
6. Pour batter onto the pan using a tablespoon.
7. Cook until bubbles form on the surface of the pancake, then flip and cook until browned on the other side.
Food Exchange per serving: 4 PANCAKES 3 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGES, 1 MILK EXCHANGE; PRO: 20mg; FAT: 8gm; CAR: 72gm.
